subcodes.first_line: O spiritual one! Upon thee be My glory, My mercy and My loving-kindness. The Most Great Ocean hath, in this hour, willed to bestow a pearl [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا روحانی علیک بهائی و رحمتی و عنایتی بحر اعظم در این حین اراده فرموده لولئی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transcendence; unknowability of God
